title: Syrian Cardamom Tagine
description: A rich and aromatic one-pot dish flavored with ground cardamom, perfect for any meal. This recipe serves 4-6 people and is suitable for satvik diets.

ingredients.name: Finely chopped onion
ingredients.notes: Use a sharp knife to get uniform pieces.

ingredients.name: Ground cardamom
ingredients.notes: Make sure to use freshly ground spices.

ingredients.name: Coriander powder
ingredients.notes: Use a spice grinder for a more intense flavor.

ingredients.name: Turmeric powder
ingredients.notes: Add a pinch for extra color.

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Use kosher salt for better flavor.

ingredients.name: Fresh cilantro
ingredients.notes: Use the leaves and tender stems only.

instructions: Heat the ghee or oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Saute the onion until translucent and slightly golden brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the ground cardamom, cumin, coriander, and turmeric. Cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the broth and rice. Stir to combine, then bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover the saucepan with a tight-fitting lid, and simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
Fluff the tagine with a fork and garnish with fresh cilantro.

axes.mainIngredient: dishes made with rice and spices
